p2p_enrich.notes: Added 5 pass_to_pass repo_tests: test_repo_lint (pnpm lint), test_repo_typecheck (pnpm typecheck), test_repo_format_check (pnpm format:check), test_repo_changes_validate (pnpm changes:validate), test_repo_cookie_tests (pnpm --filter @remix-run/cookie test). All verified passing on base commit. Updated eval_manifest.yaml with new checks. test_outputs.py written to /workspace/task/test_outputs.py (tests/ directory not writable).

validate.notes: Fixed solve.sh to: (1) properly format SKILL.md files with Prettier-compatible structure, (2) add trailing newlines to YAML files, (3) run pnpm install and npx prettier --write after creating files. All 12 tests pass.
